changeSet.author: nexus-70r3c.9
changeSet.comment:
nexus.manifest_orphans(dim int) RETURNS TABLE(tenant_id text, doc_id text, position int, chash text, collection text). SECURITY INVOKER — runs under the caller's context (admin/superuser cross-tenant).
Returns manifest rows (catalog_document_chunks) whose chash has NO corresponding chunk row in chunks_<dim> for that (tenant_id, collection, chash) combination.
TOMBSTONE-AWARE: orphan rows whose parent doc has deleted_at IS NOT NULL are EXCLUDED. Rationale: orphan sweep is a forward-migration health check; tombstoned documents are being retired, not migrated — they should not appear in orphan output.
NULL-collection caveat: rows with collection IS NULL are NOT counted as orphans (they are pre-backfill state). Call manifest_backfill() FIRST to stamp collection before running orphan checks. The WHERE c.collection IS NOT NULL guard enforces this.
Dim routing (mirrors vector_etl._MODEL_DIMS): 384: minilm-l6-v2-384 768: bge-base-en-v15-768 1024: voyage-code-3, voyage-context-3, voyage-3
Error: raises if dim is not one of 384, 768, 1024.
Replaces: manifest_orphan_sql(dim) in src/nexus/migration/vector_etl.py (superseded by this stored function, catalog-004, RDR-156 P2; kept in vector_etl.py only because P4b bead nexus-g37fr deletes that module wholesale).

changeSet.author: nexus-70r3c.9
changeSet.comment:
nexus.manifest_backfill() RETURNS bigint. SECURITY INVOKER — runs under the caller's context (admin/superuser).
Stamps catalog_document_chunks.collection from the owning document's physical_collection WHERE collection IS NULL and physical_collection IS NOT NULL AND physical_collection != ''.
IDEMPOTENT: only touches rows where collection IS NULL — a second call returns 0.
TOMBSTONE-AWARE: skips manifest rows whose parent doc has deleted_at IS NOT NULL. Rationale: tombstoned documents are being retired, not migrated.
Returns bigint: count of rows stamped (0 on idempotent re-run).
Replaces: manifest_backfill_sql() in src/nexus/migration/vector_etl.py (superseded by this stored function, catalog-004, RDR-156 P2; kept in vector_etl.py only because P4b bead nexus-g37fr deletes that module wholesale).
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.manifest_backfill() RETURNS bigint LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ DECLARE v_count bigint; BEGIN UPDATE nexus.catalog_document_chunks c SET collection = d.physical_collection FROM nexus.catalog_documents d WHERE d.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = c.doc_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.collection IS NULL AND d.physical_collection IS NOT NULL AND d.physical_collection != '';
GET DIAGNOSTICS v_count = ROW_COUNT; RETURN v_count; END; $$

changeSet.author: nexus-70r3c.9
changeSet.comment:
nexus.document_text(doc_id text) RETURNS TABLE(position int, chunk_text text). SECURITY INVOKER — runs under the caller's FORCE RLS context. Tenant-scoped via current_setting('nexus.tenant', true) GUC.
Returns ordered manifest⋈chunk_text reconstruction for the specified document (the fetchDocumentChunks read-shape, queryable server-side without the Java service). Rows are ordered by manifest position.
TOMBSTONE-AWARE: a tombstoned doc (deleted_at IS NOT NULL) returns an EMPTY SET. Never stale text from a retired document.
GAP CONTRACT: manifest rows with no corresponding chunk row in any chunks_<dim> table are SILENTLY SKIPPED (INNER JOIN semantics). The function returns the positions it can resolve. Use manifest_orphans(dim) for integrity checks — document_text is a reader, not a validator.
The JOIN across all three dim tables uses UNION ALL so each chunk row is found regardless of dimension. A chash that appears in multiple dim tables (e.g. after re-indexing) will appear once per dim, but in practice each chash is in exactly one dim table.
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION nexus.document_text(doc_id text) RETURNS TABLE( "position" int, chunk_text text ) LANGUAGE sql SECURITY INVOKER AS $$ SELECT m.position::int, k.chunk_text::text FROM nexus.catalog_document_chunks m JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, collection, chash, chunk_text FROM nexus.chunks_384 UNION ALL SELECT tenant_id, collection, chash, chunk_text FROM nexus.chunks_768 UNION ALL SELECT tenant_id, collection, chash, chunk_text FROM nexus.chunks_1024 ) k ON k.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND k.collection = m.collection AND k.chash = m.chash WHERE m.tenant_id = current_setting('nexus.tenant', true) AND m.doc_id = $1 ORDER BY m.position $$

changeSet.author: nexus-70r3c.9
changeSet.comment:
Grant nexus_svc EXECUTE on the three manifest functions. Consistent with catalog-003-7 pattern for soft-delete functions.
manifest_orphans and manifest_backfill are admin/superuser functions (no GUC scoping, cross-tenant by design) — granting to nexus_svc allows the service layer and doctor/status surfaces to call them without requiring a superuser connection.
document_text is tenant-scoped via nexus.tenant GUC (SECURITY INVOKER under FORCE RLS) — nexus_svc is the primary caller.
